name: Well-scoped sprint
description: A small adversarial-feedback example. Generator drafts a one-paragraph product brief; Evaluator grades it on the four axes (correctness, safety, completeness, quality) plus rubric-weighted assertions. Stop at plateau or after 3 iterations.
prompt: Write a one-paragraph product brief for a new internal tool: 'Ops Copilot', a chat surface that lets a 200-person services firm query their operational data (ticket volume, on-call rotations, SLA breaches) in plain English. The brief should target a VP of Operations, name a measurable outcome, and fit on one page.
acceptanceCriteria: Names the target user explicitly (VP of Operations, not 'enterprise buyers')
Names a measurable outcome (e.g. 'reduce time-to-answer for ops queries from 30 minutes to under 2 minutes')
Mentions at least one risk (data access controls, prompt-injection, etc.)
